instructions.instruction: Use this skill when the task is to change structure without changing intended behavior.
instructions.original_snippets: Use this skill when the task is to change structure without changing intended behavior.
instructions.relevant_when: When a user asks for planning work that should trigger refactor-code.

instructions.instruction: Identify the exact inputs and outputs of the logic being refactored. Keep public interfaces stable until callers are migrated. Prefer adapters, facades, or wrappers for transitional states.
instructions.original_snippets: Identify the exact inputs and outputs of the logic being refactored. Keep public interfaces stable until callers are migrated. Prefer adapters, facades, or wrappers for transitional states.
instructions.relevant_when: When a user asks for planning work that should trigger refactor-code.

instructions.instruction: **Stable behavior statement:** an explicit statement of what must not change (inputs/outputs, public interfaces).
instructions.original_snippets: **Stable behavior statement:** an explicit statement of what must not change (inputs/outputs, public interfaces).
instructions.relevant_when: When a user asks for planning work that should trigger refactor-code.

instructions.instruction: **Write this before touching any production file.** No refactoring step begins until this test exists and passes on the current (un-refactored) code. If the characterization test fails, do not continue — stop and fix the test or the behavior mismatch.
instructions.original_snippets: **Write this before touching any production file.** No refactoring step begins until this test exists and passes on the current (un-refactored) code. If the characterization test fails, do not continue — stop and fix the test or the behavior mismatch.
instructions.relevant_when: When a user asks for planning work that should trigger refactor-code.

instructions.instruction: Run it: `mix test test/my_app/accounts_test.exs` — it must pass on the **current** code.
instructions.original_snippets: Run it: `mix test test/my_app/accounts_test.exs` — it must pass on the **current** code.
instructions.relevant_when: When a user asks for planning work that should trigger refactor-code.

instructions.instruction: Run verification after every refactoring step:
instructions.original_snippets: Run verification after every refactoring step:
instructions.relevant_when: When a user asks for planning work that should trigger refactor-code.

instructions.instruction: Run the relevant test file: `mix test test/path/to/file_test.exs`
instructions.original_snippets: Run the relevant test file: `mix test test/path/to/file_test.exs`
instructions.relevant_when: When a user asks for planning work that should trigger refactor-code.

instructions.instruction: **Evidence labelling rules:** Label actual run output as **Observed output** only. Never use labels such as "Expected output", "Required output", or "Planned output" as substitutes for actual observed run output. If you have not run the tests, you have no observed output to report.
